MR026LReconditioningNASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for postflight reconditioning. Tracks crew recovery and rehabilitation progress after long-duration spaceflight.Questionnairehttps://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/Questionnaire/mr026l-reconditioning#0.5.8
overviewMedical Requirements Overview0..1group
overview.mrid-numberMRID Number and Title0..1displayInitial Value: string = MR026L Postflight Reconditioning
overview.sponsorSponsor1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Sponsor Organizations#ascr "Astronaut Strength Conditioning and Rehabilitation"
overview.disciplineDiscipline1..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Medical Disciplines#reconditioning "Reconditioning"
overview.purposePurpose/Objectives0..1textInitial Value: string = To guide and monitor crew physical reconditioning after long-duration spaceflight, with goal of returning to preflight functional capacity.

initial-assessment.muscle-sorenessMuscle Soreness/Pain0..1choiceOptions: 4 options
initial-assessment.back-painBack Pain Present0..1boolean
initial-assessment.initial-planInitial Reconditioning Plan0..1text

weekly-progress.dateAssessment Date0..1date
weekly-progress.sessions-completedReconditioning Sessions Completed0..1integer

final-assessment.total-durationTotal Reconditioning Duration (days)0..1integer

final-assessment.strength-baselineReturn to Strength Baseline0..1boolean

data-delivery.archiveData Archive System0..1choiceOptions: 1 option
Initial Value: Coding = NASA Medical Data Archive Systems#mmis "Medical Mission Information System"

Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#ascr ("Astronaut Strength Conditioning and Rehabilitation")

Answer options for overview.discipline

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-discipline-cs#reconditioning ("Reconditioning")

Answer options for initial-assessment.orthostatic-status

  • No orthostatic intolerance
  • Mild orthostatic symptoms
  • Moderate orthostatic symptoms
  • Significant orthostatic intolerance

Answer options for initial-assessment.gait-stability

  • Normal
  • Mildly unsteady
  • Moderately unsteady
  • Significantly impaired

Answer options for initial-assessment.muscle-soreness

  • None
  • Mild
  • Moderate
  • Severe

Answer options for weekly-progress.balance-status

  • Returned to normal
  • Improving
  • Stable
  • Requires intervention

Answer options for data-delivery.archive

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs#mmis ("Medical Mission Information System")

extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MR026LReconditioning
title: MR026L Reconditioning Assessment
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for postflight reconditioning. Tracks crew recovery and rehabilitation progress after long-duration spaceflight.
purpose: To document and track crew reconditioning progress after long-duration spaceflight, including physical rehabilitation and return to baseline function.
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: To guide and monitor crew physical reconditioning after long-duration spaceflight, with goal of returning to preflight functional capacity.
